channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Hate speech dramatically increased on X under Elon Musk’s watch, researchers say
item.description: Hate speech on X dramatically increased during the several months that Elon Musk served as CEO when compared to the prior months, according to a new study.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Google Chrome might soon use AI to make you a better password
item.description: Google’s possibly impending ‘AI innovation’ makes getting on top of data breaches that much easier, but there’s little else to it other than convenience.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: A deep-sea neutrino telescope spots the most energetic ghost particle yet
item.description: A neutrino detector submerged in the Mediterranean Sea has sniffed out the most energetic ghost particle yet.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Scarlett Johansson calls out AI misuse after viral video ripping Ye
item.description: Scarlett Johansson says while she has "no tolerance" for hate speech, she's calling out the "misuse" of artificial intelligence (AI) in a viral video featuring her and other Jewish performers responding to antisemitic remarks by Ye, the rapper formerly known as Kanye West.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, The Hill

item.title: How to not fall in love with AI-powered romance scammers
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to protect yourself against artificial intelligence-fueled romance scams, which have become the most common type of fraud in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Looking for love this Valentine's Day? Don't fall for Instagram romance scams
item.description: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta Platforms is urging users to stay vigilant about “romance scams” ahead of Valentine’s Day, warning of unsolicited messages through its apps and other social media platforms, as well as general text messages.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Opinion: DeepSeek exposed dangerous AI nonsense that Trump and Biden fell for
item.description: Instead of trying to keep the AI genie bottled up, government and industry should be preparing us for sweeping changes.
item.dc:creator: Zeynep Tufekci, The Mercury News

item.title: New US CIO appointments, February 2025
item.description: Movers & Shakers is where you can keep up with new CIO appointments and gain valuable insight into the job market and CIO hiring trends.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Claves para que el CIO fiche al mejor equipo de TI
item.description: Uno de los sueños de cualquier dirigente, sea o no de TI, es, sin duda, formar un ‘dream team‘, donde cada persona aporte su valor, en el que poder confiar plenamente y que se entienda y trabaje al unísono. La realidad no siempre resulta tan positiva.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Elon Musk $97.4 billion bid complicates matters for OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has dismissed a $97.4 billion takeover bid led by rival Elon Musk, but the unsolicited offer could complicate Altman’s push to transform the maker of ChatGPT into a for-profit company.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Thalia Beaty And Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: News influencers favored Trump over Harris during campaign, study finds
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Americans who followed news influencers during the presidential campaign were more likely to hear positive reports about Donald Trump than they were about Kamala Harris, a study has revealed.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Internet upgrade part of a move towards 400/800G connectivity
item.description: The industry transition to 400 Gigabit Ethernet networking took a big step forward this week when the world’s leading Internet exchange operator announced plans to upgrade its New York backbone to 400G.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Notre Dame scores big with Wi-Fi 6E stadium upgrade
item.description: When 80,000 fans fill the University of Notre Dame’s iconic football stadium on Saturday afternoons in the fall to cheer on the Fighting Irish, there’s no shortage of high-decibel screaming. And now, thanks to a major network expansion, there’s no shortage of high-bandwidth streaming.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Identify any mystery caller for free with this phone number lookup tool
item.description: The TruePeopleSearch.com website works for landline and cellphone numbers, allowing you to do a reverse phone lookup for any type of phone number.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Government Procurement Efficiency List: Reducing Regulatory Burden
item.description: Some regulations impose compliance or administrative costs/burdens that have no relation to the work to be performed under a government contract. The post Government Procurement Efficiency List: Reducing Regulatory Burden first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Roger Waldron, Federal News Network

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fortinet Refreshes Branch Office Firewalls with Power and Features
item.description: Fortinet has refreshed its branch office firewalls, adding power and features to its next-generation FortiGate G-series devices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Digging into voice AI platform Deepgram
item.description: Deepgram is the leading voice AI platform used by over 200,000 developers to build speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and full speech-to-speech (which enables individuals with speech disabilities to be clearly understood) tools.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to block your phone from tracking your location
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Smartphones are useful tools for everyday life, but they're privy to nearly everything about you, including all the places you've been — if you let them.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Google scraps its diversity hiring goals as it complies with Trump's new government contractor rules
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is scrapping some of its diversity hiring targets, joining a lengthening list of U.S. companies that have abandoned or scaled back their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5
